query:
SELECT DISTINCT ap.alunoId, a.name, a.consultorId 
FROM appointment_participants ap 
JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id 
JOIN mentor_appointments ma ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id 
WHERE ma.status != 'cancelado' 
LIMIT 5
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT DISTINCT ap.alunoId, a.name, a.consultorId 
FROM appointment_participants ap 
JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id 
JOIN mentor_appointments ma ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id 
WHERE ma.status != 'cancelado' 
LIMIT 5
